name: DEPPON LOGISTICS Co., LTD.
summary: DEPPON LOGISTICS Co., LTD. operates as a logistics company in China, Korea, Japan, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, and internationally. It offers less-than-truckload transportation, full truck load transportation, delivery, and warehousing management services, as well as supply chain management and cross-border services. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
